meaning: vt.担任...主持人,主持n.司仪,主持人
examples: I enjoy acting as an emcee of many lectures and evenings.
My daughter recited the actor's lines for the emcee in the daytime.
This evokes in me the weird blend of pleasure, gratitude, and revulsion I'd feel if the emcee publicly fondled my toes.
"Free shots for everyone on the conga line, " booms the burly emcee from New Orleans.
It was an embarrassingly long and over-the-top game, complete with an obnoxious emcee and not-so-necessary confetti.
